OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Nicole Grays, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff West Hotel L.P.
Attorney, Michael Sherwood Rossoff representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Walter Kopeikin is present.
Attorney, Kristen Brumfield representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of JUL-27-2009 is vacated.
